title: Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD) - Agenda January 26, 2018 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD) - Agenda January 26, 2018
Place: Holland  Cross, Tower B, 2 nd floor, Room 2048 Date and Time: January 26, 2018 at 8:00am to 4:00pm, EST
Chairperson: Robert DiRaddo Science Policy Advisors: Daniel Yoon, Hripsime Shahbazian Participants: SAP-SaMD members and Health Canada employees
Welcome  and Opening remarks Celia Lourenco, Senior  Executive Director, Therapeutic Products Directorate (TPD)
Introduction of Members, Review of  Affiliations and Interests Declarations, Chair’s address, Review of Agenda Chair
Health Canada presentation Medical  Devices Bureau, TPD
Regulator presentation United  States Food and Drug Administration
Industry presentation Council  of Canadian Innovators
Industry presentation MEDEC
Health Canada presentation – Draft  guidance document overview Bureau  of Policy, Science and International Programs, TPD
Deliberations of Questions and Answers SAP-SaMD  members
Deliberations of Questions and  Answers SAP-SaMD members
Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
*Times indicated are to be used as a guide for the Chairperson and are  approximate.
